title: feat(references): add rwa-protocols.md deep reference
body:
## Summary

Create comprehensive RWA (Real World Asset) protocol security reference file (`references/rwa-protocols.md`) as a deep-reference for auditing RWA protocols.

**Spec:** [2026-04-15-ssas-rwa-protocols-reference](docs/specs/2026/04/2026-04-15-ssas-rwa-protocols-reference.md)

Closes #4

## What's Included

- **Trust Model & Architecture** — off-chain asset custodian trust, pool manager privilege escalation with vulnerable/secure code patterns
- **NAV Oracle Manipulation** — stale NAV vectors, over-borrowing attacks, T-bill vault oracle risks
- **Epoch Redemption Race Conditions** — front-running redemption windows, queue manipulation, cancellation deadline enforcement
- **Tranche Accounting Attacks** — senior/junior rounding errors, bad debt allocation manipulation
- **KYC/Transfer Restriction Bypass** — ERC-1400/ERC-3643 transfer hook bypass, whitelist staleness, wrapper bypass
- **Default Handling** — grace period abuse, write-down timing manipulation, premature recovery
- **Protocol-Specific Patterns** — Centrifuge (epoch coordinator, NAV oracle), Maple (pool delegate collusion, cover asset), T-bill vaults (redemption gating, rebasing)
- **Comprehensive Audit Checklist** — 42 items across 7 categories

## Cross-Reference Updates

- `CLAUDE.md`: architecture table updated
- `SKILL.md`: Phase 0 routing table, Phase 4 loading instruction, v3.11.0 changelog
- `INDEX-defi.md`: 10 new entries for RWA sections
- `defi-checklist.md`: deep reference pointer added

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] `references/rwa-protocols.md` exists with all 8 sections
- [x] File is under 700 lines (532 lines)
- [x] INDEX-defi.md has entries for the new file
- [x] CLAUDE.md architecture table lists the file
- [x] SKILL.md Phase 4 references rwa-protocols.md
- [x] defi-checklist.md has cross-reference pointer (no duplicate content)

## Testing

- Manual review: all 8 sections present with code examples
- Line count: 532 lines (target < 700)
- Cross-references verified in all updated files
